dimensions.name: Streamlit State Management
dimensions.description: Evaluates correct use of st.session_state for maintaining application state across re-runs. Streamlit re-executes the entire script on every user interaction, so any data that must persist (conversation history, API results, user preferences) must be stored in st.session_state. Direct variable assignment outside session_state will reset on every interaction. Avoid storing large objects (entire DataFrames, model weights) in session_state unnecessarily.

dimensions.name: Claude Integration Patterns
dimensions.description: Evaluates Anthropic SDK usage patterns specific to Claude. Streaming responses should use `with client.messages.stream()` for a better UX in chat apps. The `model` parameter should reference a valid Claude model string. The `max_tokens` parameter must always be set (Claude requires it). Response content should be accessed via `response.content[0].text` with a type check, not direct string coercion. SDK version compatibility should be reflected in requirements.txt.
